infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Springs Israel Beta to capture photos for moderated spring reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Springs Israel Beta to attach photos from your library to moderated spring reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Springs Israel Beta to save temporary processed report photos during internal beta testing.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Springs Israel Beta to capture photos for moderated spring reports.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow Springs Israel Beta to attach photos from your library to moderated spring reports.
